title: Parry Platypus Warden
description: This resource pack changes the warden to Parry Platypus from the animated series Phineas and Ferb.
body:
![Perry Platypus Warden](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/WandererEdges/Modrinth/main/111.png)
## Description

**Parry Platypus Warden** - This resource pack changes the warden to Parry Platypus from the animated series Phineas and Ferb and changes the warden spawn egg
![Alt text](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/WandererEdges/Modrinth/main/egg1.png)
- - - -
![Optifine required](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/WandererEdges/Modrinth/main/nFESfBi.png)
This pack uses an OptiFine feature called Custom Entity Models (CEM) and CIT Resewn.
- - - -
